title: NLUO invites applications for 3-year LLB and Ph.D programmes
description: National Law University, Odisha (NLUO) has opened admissions for its 3-year LL.B, and Ph.D programmes for the academic year 2026-27. 3-year LLB programmeWho can apply?The 3-year LL.B programme has a total of 60 seats. Persons with a graduate degree in any discipline may apply for the course. Those who are appearing for the final year graduation exams or awaiting results may also apply in anticipation.
